message:
fix(fcp-mesh): remove epoch mismatch check and pass object IDs to receipt validation

Remove DegradedTransportError::EpochMismatch and the epoch_id ==
envelope.epoch_id check in encode_control_plane. The transport epoch
in the FCPS header is the authoritative value; the envelope's stored
epoch_id is only meaningful on the receiving side after decode.

Update MeshNode::validate_receipt_binding to pass receipt_id and
intent_id to the updated fcp_core::validate_receipt_intent_binding.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
